violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch.PIC relocated can opener to dishwasher to be washed, rinsed and sanitized at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/02/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 10/10/2024

The ice scoops in the bar area were stored on an unclean surface (top of the ice well/bin) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/10/2024

The following equipment/utensils were observed in poor repair: 1) The blades of two knives were chipped or bent. PIC took knives out of service and replaced with new one at time of inspection 2) The rounded edge of a metal ice scoop was heavily dented/warped. PIC took scoop out of service at time of inspection 3) The stopper/plugs of the three bay sink were not adequately sealing which allowed for water to drain New Violation. Correct By: 10/24/2024

The following non-food contact surfaces were observed with an accumulation of debris: 1) A knife rack on the main cook line had food debris 2) The vents of the salad prep unit had an accumulation of biofilm and food residue 3) The fan covers of the walk-in cooler had an accumulation of dust New Violation. Correct By: 10/10/2024
The plumbing under the hand wash sink in the employee restroom was observed with an active leak accumulating in a bucket. New Violation. Correct By: 10/24/2024

Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. PIC dumped the water and inspector reviewed proper storage methods. PIC stated hot well will be serviced tomorrow. Establishment plans to store utensils in water above 135 degrees. New Violation. Correct By: 10/19/2023
The monitor above the cold rail/prep station was observed with an accumulation of dust and food debris. New Violation. Correct By: 10/19/2023
